title: nasturtium wrightii
intro: Nasturtium wrightii, also known as Wright's nasturtium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium wrightii include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
